tasks.title: Align Buy Credits with navbar options
tasks.objective: Adjust shared navigation markup/styles so the Buy Credits button aligns with the other navbar options on primary pages.
authority: Fix alignment while preserving the non-payment placeholder route behavior from ISSUE-012.
Keep the shared topbar consistent across pages.
Do not implement real credit purchasing or ledger changes.
acceptance_criteria: `Buy Credits` aligns with the other navbar options on desktop.
The nav remains usable and visually coherent on mobile widths.
`Buy Credits` still routes to the existing safe placeholder page.
No payment, credit grant, or purchase transaction behavior is added.
Focused tests or browser smoke verify the alignment-sensitive navigation surface.
verification: Run `npm run check` before issue closeout.
Browser smoke test primary navigation at desktop and mobile widths if UI changes are implemented.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when Buy Credits is visually aligned with the other nav items and still cannot create or grant credits.
